segments.text: Mega Volt pierces straight into the ledge getup!
segments.original_text: スイレーメガボルトそのまま起き上がりに突き刺さる

segments.text: There've been a lot of early Mega Volts coming out up until now, but—
segments.original_text: さっきからね先出しメガボルトが多かったですけど

segments.text: And now he's approaching with Mega Volt from the right side!
segments.original_text: ここに来てドラ右先に来てメガボルトっていうね

full_text: Mega Volt pierces straight into the ledge getup! There've been a lot of early Mega Volts coming out up until now, but— And now he's approaching with Mega Volt from the right side! And that's—
